2606.26816.title: Computational Analysis of Heart Rate Variability in Healthy Adults
2606.26816.paper_summary: Heart Rate Variability (HRV) analysis is a key indicator of cardiac physiological state and aids in disease diagnosis. However, research on HRV parameters in healthy individuals remains limited, and no gold standard exists. This study evaluates HRV indices in 40 healthy adults (20 men, 20 women, aged 30-50) to improve HRV's clinical utility. Using computational methods for signal processing and data analysis, time, frequency, and nonlinear indices were analyzed to address five questions: (1) normality, (2) stability, (3) correlation, (4) reproducibility, and (5) consistency. Key findings: (1) Time-domain and nonlinear indices, particularly global and LF (low frequency), follow normal distributions, with gender differences noted. (2) Most indices are stable except HF (high frequency)-related ones. (3) High correlations in HF-related indices suggest redundancy, indicating only one is necessary in studies. (4) Comparisons with the Fantasia database revealed less than 10% error for most indices, except SD2 and SDNN in women (greater than 15%). (5) Time-domain and nonlinear indices show low inter-study variability, while frequency-domain indices exhibit high variability, limiting cross-study comparisons. The selected indices-ApEn and IRRR (global variability), HRVi and SD2 (LF), and MADRR or rMSSD (HF)-are best suited for accurately representing HRV components and enhancing its clinical and research relevance.
2606.26816.paper_summary_zh: 心率變異性（HRV）分析是心臟生理狀態的關鍵指標，有助於疾病診斷。<lb/>然而，對健康個體的HRV參數研究仍然有限，且尚無金標準。<lb/>本研究評估了40名健康成年人（20名男性，20名女性，年齡30-50歲）的HRV指標，以提高HRV的臨床實用性。<lb/>使用計算方法進行信號處理和數據分析，分析了時間、頻率和非線性指標，以解決五個問題：（1）正態性，（2）穩定性，（3）相關性，（4）重現性，以及（5）一致性。<lb/>主要發現：（1）時間域和非線性指標，特別是全局和LF（低頻），遵循正態分佈，並注意到性別差異。<lb/>（2）除了與HF（高頻）相關的指標外，大多數指標是穩定的。<lb/>（3）HF相關指標之間的高相關性表明冗餘，這意味著在研究中只需要一個指標。<lb/>（4）與Fantasia數據庫的比較顯示，大多數指標的誤差低於10％，除了女性的SD2和SDNN（超過15％）。<lb/>（5）時間域和非線性指標顯示出低的跨研究變異性，而頻率域指標則顯示出高變異性，限制了跨研究比較。<lb/>所選指標-ApEn和IRRR（全局變異性）、HRVi和SD2（LF）、以及MADRR或rMSSD（HF）-最適合準確表示HRV組件並增強其臨床和研究相關性。
2606.26816.author: María J. Lado et.al.
2606.26816.authors: María J. Lado, Arturo J. Méndez, Leandro Rodriguez-Liñares, Baltasar García Pérez-Schofield, Pedro Cuesta-Morales, Brais Iglesias-Otero, Xose A. Vila
